reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — labeled 'Revenue' on income statement face. Maps directly to total net revenue.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — labeled 'Cost of revenue' on income statement face.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — labeled 'Gross profit' on income statement face. Equals Revenue minus Cost of revenue.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — labeled 'Operating income' on income statement face.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — labeled 'Income before income tax' on income statement face.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — labeled 'Income tax expense' on income statement face.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — labeled 'Net income' on income statement face and confirmed as starting line of CFO reconciliation in cash flow statement. No NCI — NVDA reports consolidated net income with no minority interest attribution.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — labeled 'Interest expense' on income statement face, reported as a positive magnitude (displayed in parentheses). This is gross interest expense; no separate gross/net disclosure needed. Normalized to negative for analytical output.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — labeled 'Stock-based compensation expense' in cash flow statement operating section addback. Confirmed consistent with us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in xbrl_not_on_statement (same values). CF addback used as source of truth per metric rules.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — labeled 'Depreciation and amortization' in cash flow statement operating section. Single line item; no separate components disclosed on CF face.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — labeled 'Diluted weighted average shares' on income statement face.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — labeled 'Cash and cash equivalents' on balance sheet face.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — labeled 'Marketable securities' on balance sheet face. Current marketable securities represent short-term investments.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — labeled 'Accounts receivable, net' on balance sheet face. Pure trade AR; no notes indicate combined balances.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — labeled 'Inventories' on balance sheet face. Sub-components in xbrl_not_on_statement: raw materials 4209M, WIP 8735M, finished goods 6840M (sum=19784M checks out).
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — labeled 'Accounts payable' on balance sheet face. Separate line item; not combined with accrued liabilities.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — labeled 'Total assets' on balance sheet face.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — labeled 'Total shareholders equity' on balance sheet face. No NCI component; this is parent-only equity.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent — labeled 'Short-term debt' on balance sheet face. Confirmed via xbrl_not_on_statement us-gaap:LongTermDebtCurrent as the current portion of long-term debt. No commercial paper disclosed.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — labeled 'Long-term debt' on balance sheet face (non-current). Note: xbrl_not_on_statement us-gaap:LongTermDebt=8467M represents total carrying amount inclusive of current portion; the balance sheet non-current portion 7468M is used here per standard non-current classification.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current portion: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement (341M at 2025-10-26) — embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face, not separately shown. Non-current portion: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent from BS face (2014M at 2025-10-26). Total = 341M + 2014M = 2355M, confirmed by us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability=2355M in xbrl_not_on_statement. NOTE: current operating lease liabilities are embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities on the BS face; not double-counted with short_term_debt.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — labeled 'Net cash provided by operating activities' in cash flow statement.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — labeled 'Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets' in cash flow investing section. This is the broadest capex line NVDA reports. Normalized to negative for analytical output.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — labeled 'Acquisitions, net of cash acquired' in cash flow investing section. Normalized to negative for analytical output.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — labeled 'Research and development' on income statement face.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement — 341M at 2025-10-26. Embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — labeled 'Long-term operating lease liabilities' on balance sheet face.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not separately disclosed in the cash flow supplemental disclosures in this filing. Approximation: use income statement interest expense per metric 21 fallback rule.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — labeled 'Interest income' on income statement face.
company_mapping.sga_expense: us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense — labeled 'Sales, general and administrative' on income statement face.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — raw materials component of inventory.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — work-in-process component of inventory.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — finished goods component of inventory.
company_mapping.segment_compute_networking_revenue: StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis ComputeAndNetworkingSegmentMember — revenue for Compute and Networking segment.
company_mapping.segment_graphics_revenue: StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis GraphicsSegmentMember — revenue for Graphics segment.
company_mapping.segment_compute_networking_operating_inc: StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis ComputeAndNetworkingSegmentMember — operating income for Compute and Networking segment.
company_mapping.segment_graphics_operating_income: StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis GraphicsSegmentMember — operating income for Graphics segment.
company_mapping.revenue_datacenter: ProductOrServiceAxis DataCenterMember — Data Center end market revenue.
company_mapping.revenue_gaming: ProductOrServiceAxis GamingMember — Gaming end market revenue.
company_mapping.revenue_professional_visualization: ProductOrServiceAxis ProfessionalVisualizationMember — Professional Visualization end market revenue.
company_mapping.revenue_automotive: ProductOrServiceAxis AutomotiveMember — Automotive end market revenue.
company_mapping.revenue_oem_other: ProductOrServiceAxis OEMAndOtherMember — OEM and Other end market revenue.

analytical.cash_paid_for_interest_approximation_not: Not separately disclosed in CF supplemental; use interest_expense magnitude of 61000000 as approximation per metric 21 fallback rule
